spec_match.rationale: Edit CSS, parse, tree shows each child rule with its CSSOM type — direct introspection of CSSNestedDeclarations.

edge_cases.rationale: Single editor case; no error-case CSS that should fail to parse.

openQuestions.title: Show parse-error case
openQuestions.detail: Inject malformed CSS so the visitor sees the tree reflect a parse error rather than a CSSNestedDeclarations rule.
